title: FinalLifeSMP (Health Plugin)
description: (One Of) The Official Plugin used by the FinalLifeSMP
body:
## WHAT IS THIS?
This is one of the official Plugins used by the FinalLifeSMP
Some features are:
## HEART SYSTEM

you have 10 lives, your hearts are the same between lives, you can revive and withdraw

## COMMANDS


  **lives:**
    Shows the number of lives remaining for a player.
    
    usage: /lives [player]

    
  **addlives:**
    Adds lives to a player.
    
    usage: /addlives <player> <amount>
    
    permission: permadeath.admin (or just op)

    
  **setlives:**
    Sets the lives of a player.
    
    usage: /setlives <player> <amount>
    
    permission: permadeath.admin (or just op)

    
  **withdraw:**
    Adds a hearth in exchange for a life
    
    usage: /withdraw [number]

  **unwithdraw:**
    description: Convert Permanent Hearts back into lives.
    
    usage: /unwithdraw <amount>


## REVIVE BEACON
A revival tool for perma dead players, **for crafting see images**
